links.targetTitle: Chat 1-to-1 PSS messaging with feed-indexed history shipped

global.title: Typing indicators and presence dots scratched due to PSS latency
global.content:
## Decision (2026-04-18)

The typing-indicator UI (formerly "Track A") is **not shipping**.

## Rationale

PSS message latency is 2-10 seconds because of Trojan chunk mining and push-sync. A "User is typing..." hint doesn't pay off when the message itself arrives on a longer timescale than the hint would cover. The signal would flicker or misfire more often than it would help.

## Scope of the decision

- **No UI indicator** for typing in chat.
- **Presence dots** (green-dot + "Last seen ...") are **parked**, not deleted. Low payoff relative to live collaboration, which is what users actually want next.
- **Adapter hooks stay.** `sendTyping`, `sendStoppedTyping`, `sendPresence`, `onNotification` remain in the GSOC notifier because they are useful primitives for presence and live collab.

## Consequence

Engineering attention redirects from ephemeral status indicators toward the live-collaboration track, where the latency profile is tolerable and the payoff is concrete.
global.description: 2026-04-18 decision: no typing-indicator UI will ship. PSS 2-10s latency makes the hint useless. Presence dots also parked; adapter hooks kept for live collab.
